message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

title Keyple 2.0 - Adapter of keyple-service-resource-java-lib - 2.0.0 (21/06/2021)

legend right
Colors legend :
* External public API references :
* calypsonet-terminal-reader-java-api
* keyple-service-java-lib
endlegend

package "org.eclipse.keyple.core.service.resource" {
    class CardResourceServiceProvider {
        <<C>>
        final
        ...
    }

    interface CardResourceServiceAdapter {
        <<CardResourceService>>
        <<PluginObserverSpi>>
        <<CardReaderObserverSpi>>
        final
        + getInstance() : CardResourceServiceAdapter
        + getCardResourceInfo(cardResource: CardResource) : String
        + getReaderManager(reader: Reader) : ReaderManagerAdapter
        + registerPoolCardResource(cardResource: CardResource, poolPlugin: PoolPlugin) : void
        + configure(configurator: CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter) : void
        + getConfigurator() : CardResourceServiceConfigurator
        + getMinimalConfigurator() : MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator
        + start() : void
        + stop() : void
        + getCardResource(cardResourceProfileName: String) : CardResource
        + getCardResource() : CardResource
        + releaseCardResource(cardResource: CardResource) : void
        + removeCardResource(cardResource: CardResource) : void
        + onPluginEvent(pluginEvent: PluginEvent) : void
        + onReaderEvent(readerEvent: CardReaderEvent) : void
    }

    class CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter {
        <<CardResourceServiceConfigurator>>
        <<MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator>>
        <<AllocationStrategyStep>>
        <<UsageTimeoutStep>>
        <<PluginStep>>
        <<PluginMonitoringStep>>
        <<PoolAllocationStrategyStep>>
        <<PoolPluginStep>>
        <<AllocationTimingParameterStep>>
        <<ProfileStep>>
        <<ProfileParameterStep>>
        <<ConfigurationStep>>
        final
        + CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter() : CardResourceServiceConfigurator
        ...
        + MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator() : MinimalCardResourceServiceConfigurator
        ...
    }

    class CardProfileManagerAdapter {
        <<C>>
        final
        + CardProfileManagerAdapter(cardProfile: CardProfile, globalConfiguration: CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter) : CardProfileManagerAdapter
        + removeCardResource(cardResource: CardResource) : void
        + onReaderConnected(readerManager: ReaderManagerAdapter) : void
        + onCardInserted(readerManager: ReaderManagerAdapter) : void
        + getCardResource() : CardResource
    }

    class ReaderManagerAdapter {
        <<C>>
        final
        + ReaderManagerAdapter(reader: Reader, plugin: Plugin, readerConfiguratorSpi: ReaderConfiguratorSpi, usageTimeoutMillis: int) : ReaderManagerAdapter
        + getReader() : Reader
        + getPlugin() : Plugin
        + getCardResources() : Set<CardResource>
        + isActive() : boolean
        + activate() : void
        + matches(extension: CardResourceProfileExtension) : CardResource
        + lock(cardResource: CardResource, extension: CardResourceProfileExtension) : boolean
        + unlock() : void
        + removeCardResource(cardResource: CardResource) : void
    }

    class CardResourceAdapter {
        <<C>>
        <<CardResource>>
        final
        + CardResourceAdapter(reader: CardReader, smartCard: SmartCard) : CardResource
        + getReader() : CardReader
        + getSmartCard() : SmartCard
    }
}

class CardResourceServiceAdapter #FFD700
class CardResourceAdapter #FFD700
class CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter #FFD700
class ReaderManagerAdapter #FFD700
class CardProfileManagerAdapter #FFD700

CardResourceServiceProvider ..|> CardResourceServiceAdapter : provide
CardResourceServiceAdapter ..> CardResourceServiceConfiguratorAdapter : 1
CardResourceServiceAdapter ..> CardProfileManagerAdapter : 1..N
CardResourceServiceAdapter ..> ReaderManagerAdapter : 0..N
CardProfileManagerAdapter ..> CardResourceAdapter : create for pool plugin : 0..N
ReaderManagerAdapter ..> CardResourceAdapter : create for regular plugin : 0..N

@enduml
```
